name: Choosing The Right Markets and the Right Partners for Informix
description: Aberdeen Group analysis of the optimal markets and channel partners for Informix. Covers industry trends (open systems, RAD, distributed computing, client-server), customer decision-making dynamics, CSS market characteristics with pricing tiers ($500-$150k/module by company size), and detailed channel partner assessments (VARs, ISVs, OEMs, SIs, Big 6). Includes vertical market ratings for telecomm, retail, banking, manufacturing, and state/local government. 67-slide deck used in Informix sales training.
